Confirmation Dialogs

Some destructive actions in Stillwater open a confirmation dialog before proceeding (deleting an artist, restoring provider defaults, revoking an API token). These toggles let you suppress dialogs for actions you've grown comfortable with; turn them back on anytime. Read more →

Destructive actions in Stillwater (delete an artist, clear a cache, revoke a token) prompt you to confirm before going through. Each dialog has a Don't ask again checkbox; this section lists every dialog you have suppressed so you can re-enable the prompt if you change your mind.

If you previously checked "Don't ask again" on a confirmation dialog, you can reset all preferences here to restore those prompts.

Preferences reset.
